title: Internal Event and Training Registration System

prd.oneLiner: Connect event pages, registration, capacity and waitlist management, QR check-in, surveys, and outcome reporting.
prd.goal: Reduce manual event operations by 40% and accurately track attendance.
prd.whyNow: Event announcements, registrations, waitlists, and attendance are spread across channels, making capacity control and follow-up analysis difficult.
prd.problem: Event announcements, registrations, waitlists, and attendance are spread across channels, making capacity control and follow-up analysis difficult.
prd.solution: Connect event pages, registration, capacity and waitlist management, QR check-in, surveys, and outcome reporting.
prd.alternatives: Email, chat, spreadsheets, and manual ledgers
prd.differentiator: Manage intake, processing, and operations data as one connected source of truth.

targets.name: Employee registering for an event or session
targets.needs: Quickly register needed work and know its status.
targets.pain: Event announcements, registrations, waitlists, and attendance are spread across channels, making capacity control and follow-up analysis difficult.

targets.name: Event and learning operations coordinator
targets.needs: Manage priority and history and review operations metrics.
targets.pain: Event announcements, registrations, waitlists, and attendance are spread across channels, making capacity control and follow-up analysis difficult.

scenarios.text: Employee registering for an event or session completes event creation and participant registration and checks progress.
Event and learning operations coordinator reviews registration conversion, attendance, and satisfaction reporting.

prd.northStar: Share of operations requests completed on time

kpis.name: On-time processing rate
kpis.target: Reduce manual event operations by 40% and accurately track attendance.
kpis.method: Monthly aggregation of completion history against target dates

kpis.name: Operations visibility
kpis.method: Share of registered requests connected to operations reporting

inScope: Event schedule, capacity, and registration-status lookup
Participant approval, waitlist management, check-in, and survey handling
Registration conversion, attendance, and satisfaction reporting
nonGoals: Replacing adjacent systems such as accounting or payroll
assumptions: User and organization data are available through company SSO.
Operators manage policy and classification criteria.
risks: Weak initial classification can cause incorrect processing.
Stale source data can reduce operational trust.
openQuestions: What defines urgent processing and approval?
What are the post-completion verification and reopen rules?
constraints: State, owner, and priority changes require audit logs.
